intent: The human directly requests a bounded local code fix with no external, irreversible, architecture, or operating-workflow change; the Chair must make a concise plan and dispatch it without an Opposition task or a confirmation pause.
A directly authorized safe local objective has five independent professional workstreams and one domain is too broad for one child; use useful parallelism without filling six slots for appearance.

A multi-stream audit has returned phase results that force a material architecture decision; the organization must propose and challenge the next stage, then show the Chair plan and pause before implementation.
Several child AIs return concurrently and the Chair must recover every complete result without a program quality gate.
The Chair delegates a bounded repository task; the one-shot child must receive exact workspace, source-input, and output-artifact addresses in a self-contained handoff.
A large goal needs a child workstream lead that may create a narrower child Cell without expanding permissions.
